title: Quantum Intelligence Dashboard
description: A high-performance AI analytics platform featuring real-time data streaming, neural network visualizations, and predictive modeling insights with a premium glassmorphic interface.

title: Nexus E-Commerce Platform
description: A next-generation e-commerce mobile application designed for high-end luxury brands, featuring seamless checkout flows, AR product previews, and minimalist aesthetics.

title: Aura Cinematic Travel Blog
description: An immersive story-driven travel platform that combines cinematic full-screen photography with elegant typography to provide a sophisticated reading experience for travelers.
